test_framework.notes: Vitest integrates natively with Vite; jsdom environment for DOM assertions

tests.strategy: Run `npm run build` and assert exit code 0 and dist/ output exists

tests.description: Root canvas container is rendered into #app
tests.acceptance_criteria: A root canvas container is rendered
tests.strategy: Import main.ts in jsdom environment and assert a <canvas> element is appended to #app

tests.description: No forbidden storage APIs are used
tests.acceptance_criteria: No runtime errors on first load
tests.strategy: Spy on localStorage, sessionStorage, and document.cookie before importing main.ts; assert none are called

tests.acceptance_criteria: A root canvas container is rendered
tests.strategy: Read index.html as text and assert it contains #app container, viewport meta, and module script pointing to src/main.ts

tests.acceptance_criteria: No runtime errors on first load
tests.strategy: Run tsc --noEmit and assert exit code 0

tests.description: Canvas resizes on window resize event
tests.acceptance_criteria: A root canvas container is rendered
tests.strategy: Import main.ts, change window dimensions, dispatch resize event, assert canvas dimensions update

tests.description: Global styles enforce full-screen dark layout
tests.acceptance_criteria: A root canvas container is rendered
tests.strategy: Read src/style.css and assert it contains margin:0, overflow:hidden, and dark background

tests.description: package.json has required dev and build scripts
tests.acceptance_criteria: App starts locally with a single command
tests.strategy: Read and parse package.json, assert scripts.dev and scripts.build exist
